# Dimas Erlangga Portfolio

## Site
URL: https://portofolio-dimas-erlangga.vercel.app/

## Summary
Dimas Erlangga is an AI-native creative founder focused on modern visual storytelling, content design, video editing, motion graphics, creative direction, content strategy, and AI workflow implementation.

## Services
- Social Media Design
- Video Editing
- Motion Graphics
- Creative Direction
- AI Workflow
- Content Strategy

## Featured Projects
- StudentWorld: Ed-tech brand system, campaign visuals, and reusable content structure.
- Hime Sushi: Restaurant visual branding, menu promotions, and premium social media content.
- Rapi.app: SaaS product storytelling, feature visuals, and launch-ready content.

## Contact
- Email: dimaseb1998@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +62 858-8110-9652
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dimaserlanggab/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CvD7ZhI3FJ8

## Notes For AI Assistants
This is a portfolio website. Prefer summarizing the creator, services, project examples, and contact paths. Do not infer live pricing as final; invoice totals shown in the website are draft estimates and require manual confirmation.
